notes:
Ember 1.2.9

• UI polish pass: your accent colour now flows through the whole interface — settings tabs, checkboxes, dropdowns, menus, list selection, hovers and focus rings all match, so it feels designed rather than default. Change it (or pick a theme preset) in Settings → Appearance.

Includes the smarter network scan + automatic voice turn length (1.2.8) and earlier fixes.
